creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to rsmith from comment #0)

Committed, once again thank you for your patch!  I discarded my revised patch after getting some info from upstream about the test suite and the ".py" extension of the console scripts (see issue #722 and #724).

P.S.: Since a few days the 20220319 release of pdfminer.six is available.  However, I will wait until a newer release of textproc/py-ocrmypdf accepts the new release of pdfminer.six.
